title: x-tra citrusy airy portuguese doenjang wrap
description: a vibrant twist on traditional portuguese cuisine, this airy wrap combines doenjang with a tangy citrus sauce and crunchy bhuna slaw.
instructions: soak the pandan leaves in water for 30 minutes.
cook the doenjang according to the package instructions.
whisk together the orange juice, lemon juice, honey, cayenne pepper, and salt to make the citrus sauce.
mix the cooked doenjang with the citrus sauce and set aside.
cook the bhuna rice according to the package instructions.
shred the mixed greens and chop the red cabbage for the slaw.
mix the slaw ingredients together and set aside.
warm the pandan leaves in a dry pan for 2 minutes.
assemble the wrap by spreading the doenjang mixture on the pandan leaf, followed by the slaw, and finishing with the bhuna rice.
